title: CatBoost correction with depth plus one
summary: Use a deeper CatBoost model as the low-weight correction.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Identify the current CatBoost depth and increase it by one for the CatBoost expert only. Keep all other CatBoost parameters and blend weight unchanged.
expected_effect: Test whether CatBoost needs stronger interaction modeling to complement RealMLP.
risk: Greater depth may overfit or slow training.
